history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, slightly blurred selfie of a young East Asian girl wearing black-rimmed glasses. She has straight, dark hair that falls just past her shoulders. Her left hand is raised, with her index finger pointing upwards, as if making a point or counting. She is wearing a white t-shirt with a graphic print on it, featuring a cartoon character (resembling Snoopy) in a speech bubble that reads "BOLEBOX" in reverse. There's a small circular yellow emoji sticker on her t-shirt near her collarbone. The background is softly out of focus, with hints of light-colored walls and possibly furniture, suggesting an indoor setting. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a warm and friendly atmosphere. The overall mood is cheerful and engaging, with the girl's gaze directed towards the camera and a hint of a smile on her lips. The color palette is dominated by the white of her t-shirt, the black of her glasses, and the natural tones of her skin and hair, with subtle warm background colors. The image has a playful, informal, and slightly youthful aesthetic.
